headline: Fastenal Equity Plans Link Employee Rewards To Dividends And Shareholder Returns
summary: Fastenal shareholders approved new equity compensation plans for employees and non employee directors at the company’s latest annual meeting. The plans are designed to align compensation more closely with shareholder interests through equity based incentives. For investors watching NasdaqGS:FAST, the approval comes at a time when the stock is priced at $44.91 and has a return of 11.1% year to date. Over the past 3 years and 5 years, returns of 76.7% and 90.2% respectively highlight how...
